reason: Stripped model-emitted tool-call XML from the assistant bubble and added remark-gfm so bare URLs auto-link. New helper at src/dashboard/lib/chat/tool-call-strip.ts wraps parseReasoning with a known-tool-name tag stripper; bubble now uses parseAssistantContent and ReactMarkdown now has remarkPlugins={[remarkGfm]}. New unit + source-level regression tests cover the stripper and the bubble wiring. Verify gates green (typecheck/lint/format/tests).
